scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/api-client && concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/worker" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/api-client && npm run build -w apps/web && wrangler dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/api-client && npm run build -w apps/worker && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/api-client && npm run test -w packages/domain && npm run test -w apps/worker && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/api-client && npm run typecheck -w apps/worker && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/mobile
scripts.mobile:dev: npm run build -w packages/api-client && npm exec -w @beach-ranker/mobile -- expo start --dev-client
scripts.ios:dev-build: npm run build -w packages/api-client && npm exec -w @beach-ranker/mobile -- eas build --platform ios --profile development
